Section: Loading and Setting Up the LLM
Description:
- Import and initialize required libraries
- Configure the base LLM for reasoning and response generation 
- Set up environment variables and necessary API keys 
- Ensure reproducibility by fixing configs and parameters

- Provide the LLM with sample questions to validate its ability to understand queries.
- Generate responses and evaluate for accuracy, clarity, and relevance. 
- Refine prompts or input formatting to improve the quality of answers.

- Load the database using SQLDatabases
- Define SQL Agent 
- Test the SQL Agent by retrieving all the columns from the database for an Order ID

- Define Order Query Tool: Takes the order context from the SQL Agent and generates a raw response for the query.
- Define Answer Tool: Refines the raw response from the Order Query Tool into a polite, formal reply for the user. 
- Combine Tools: Integrate the Order Query Tool and Answer Tool. 
- Define Chat Agent: Build a Chat Agent using the combined tools.

Section: Build a Chatbot and Answer User Queries
Description:
- Implement an Interactive Chatbot Loop (chatagent())
- Generate responses for the questions provided 
- Comment on the Agent workflow and accuracy of the outputs
- Adhere to the business report checklist
